EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Malware is blocked in traffic on host {event_src.host}. Action: {object.state}.
Malware is detected on host {event_src.host} in traffic between host {src.host} and host {dst.host}
Malware "{object.name}" is blocked on host {event_src.host} in traffic between host {src.host}:{src.port} and host {dst.host}:{dst.port}. Action: {object.state}.
The connection between host {src.host}:{src.port} and host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is blocked. Action: {object.state}.
